scripts.build:api:deploy: corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/database db:generate && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/types build && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/database build && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/utils build && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/api build
scripts.build:worker:deploy: corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/database db:generate && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/types build && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/database build && corepack pnpm --filter @dsj/worker build
scripts.lint: node -e "console.error('No package-level lint tasks are configured yet. Use pnpm verify as the current compile/build gate.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.test: node -e "console.error('No package-level test tasks are configured yet. Use pnpm verify as the current compile/build gate.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.verify:stability: pnpm db:generate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
